steps.title: Infer the comparison
steps.content: The sentence says that Maya Anderson accomplished much, but lasting historical memory gives special weight to being first. The example of Clara Reeves shows that firsts are especially hard to surpass.

steps.title: Select the surpassing phrase
steps.content: A is grammatically and logically awkward, C means vary with, and D means restrict within. The needed phrase means to triumph over or outweigh being first. The answer is B.
